meta.title: Richard Weitz on the Uprising in Kyrgyzstan
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Political-Military Analysis Richard Weitz examines the situation in Kyrgyzstan. He looks at the strategic importance of this country and the events that led up to the actions on April 7, 2010
